SourceProxy.name: KalypssoHDF5Reader
SourceProxy.label: Kalypsso HDF5 reader
SourceProxy.Documentation: short_help="Reads an HDF5 file" long_help="Reads an HDF5 file"> This reader reads HDF5 files, and the output is a vtkNonOverlappingAMR.

IntVectorProperty.name: AMRLevelMax
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: This reader supports demand-driven heavy data reading i.e. downstream pipeline can request specific blocks from the AMR using vtkCompositeDataPipeline::UPDATE_COMPOSITE_INDICES() key in RequestUpdateExtent() pass. However, when down-stream doesn't provide any specific keys, the default behavior can be setup to read at-most N levels by default. The number of levels read can be set using this method. Set this to 0 to imply no limit. Default is 1.

StringVectorProperty.name: CellArrayStatus
StringVectorProperty.label: Cell Arrays
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: This property contains a list of the cell-centered arrays to read.
